description: Document in Judaeo-Arabic, genre unclear. May have to do with communal accounting. Mentions various names (al-ḥaver, [Abū l-]Khayr al-Najjār), sums of money, and the police (al-shurṭa). Dating: Looks 11th century, or possibly 12th.
description_he: רשימה או טבלה ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק באוסף מוסרי.
